serviceParameters.label: Remote API Base URL
serviceParameters.description: Base URL for the remote data source, for example https://data.lacity.org.

serviceParameters.label: Dataset ID
serviceParameters.description: Remote dataset identifier used to build the query URL.

serviceParameters.label: Layer Name
serviceParameters.description: Display name used in the custom data feature service metadata.

serviceParameters.label: Description
serviceParameters.description: Description used in the custom data feature service metadata.

serviceParameters.label: Geometry Type
serviceParameters.description: Geometry type exposed by the provider, for example Point.

serviceParameters.label: ID Field
serviceParameters.description: Stable numeric ID field used by the custom data feature service.

serviceParameters.label: Max Record Count
serviceParameters.description: Maximum number of records returned per request.
